description: Compare each command extracted by the AST parser (saf-02) against `policy.fastAllowedCommands` and `policy.neverFastExecute`. Determine fast-mode eligibility. Cloud / package-install commands are treated specially: blocked in `/x` per §9.12 floor.
notes: The neverFastExecute list overlaps with risky regex; the rule is "any list match → not fast-mode eligible" — order does not matter.
steps: TDD: `Remove-Item` is in `neverFastExecute` → fast not OK.
TDD: `winget install` is package install → blocked in `/x`.
TDD: `kubectl apply` is in `neverFastExecute` and risky regex → blocked in `/x`.
TDD: Missing required CLI tool returns `MissingDependencies` non-empty.
name: [saf-04] Tool / command policy check
